untranslatable_reason: Signal requires straddle options strategy (long call + long put) with implied volatility expansion monitoring and calendar-based earnings announcement triggers. Allowed indicators are equity price/technical only; no options Greeks (IV, vega), earnings date detection, or derivatives strategies are available. Bid/ask spread threshold and stop loss threshold are not quantified in source material. Position sizing by normalized underlying price cannot be expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: This is a volatility-expansion options strategy keyed to earnings events. The core logic (buy before earnings, sell before announcement) requires: (1) earnings date detection [NOT AVAILABLE], (2) implied volatility measurement [NOT AVAILABLE], (3) options pricing [NOT AVAILABLE]. Attempted partial translation using volume ratio as proxy for volatility regime, but this misrepresents the actual signal intent. Recommend implementing this signal in an options-aware backtest engine with earnings calendar and IV surface data.
